name: text-stats-report
goal: Read the plain-text article at article.txt and write a JSON report at stats.json with these exact top-level keys: line_count (int, total lines including blank ones), word_count (int, whitespace-split tokens), char_count (int, total characters including whitespace and newlines), unique_words (int, count of distinct lowercase tokens after stripping punctuation).

notes.purpose: Tier 1 text-processing case. Tests cross-step reference: model must read a fixture file then produce a structured derived report. unique_words is the disambiguator — naive word_count != unique_words because the article has repetition.
